summary: Iteration 108: TV Stations System Refactor - All tests PASSED. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright. The TV system refactor is working correctly with auto-provisioning, infra_level, capacity, and direct navigation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: TV Stations refactor fully verified. Key findings: 1) GET /tv-stations/my auto-provisions stations from emittente_tv infrastructure using custom_name. 2) Stations include infra_level, capacity, content_count fields. 3) legacy_stations is always empty array. 4) Dashboard 'Le Mie TV' card navigates directly to /tv-station/{id} when single station. 5) /my-tv route redirects to /tv-station/{id}. 6) TV Station page shows correct station name 'CineWorld TV', level (Lv.1), and capacity (0/7). 7) Content management sections show capacity labels: Film 0/3, Serie TV 0/2, Anime 0/2. Auto-provisioned station ID: 0d263997-8d2d-4440-b19b-16bf0142f582.

auto_provisioning.behavior: Auto-provisions tv_station entries from emittente_tv infrastructure using infrastructure.custom_name as station_name

dashboard_direct_navigation.behavior: Single station navigates directly to /tv-station/{id} (no popup)

frontend_playwright.content_management_sections: PASSED - Shows Film 0/3, Serie TV 0/2, Anime 0/2

notes: All features for the TV Stations refactor are correctly implemented. The system auto-provisions tv_station entries from emittente_tv infrastructure, uses the infrastructure's custom_name as station_name, includes infra_level and capacity data, and the frontend correctly displays all information. Dashboard navigation and /my-tv redirect work as expected.
